sql_overrides.sql_query:
SELECT
DISTINCT
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_num,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.creation_date_dl,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.created_by_dl,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.transfer_status_code,
  (CASE WHEN  JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type = 'I' THEN 0 
  ELSE JEG_MV_COST_PA.quantity
  END) quantity,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.program_update_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_date,
  dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id,
  --nvl(JEG_MV_COST_PA.recvr_gl_date,JEG_MV_COST_PA.gl_date) recvr_gl_date,
  
  
  ( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 
  WHERE  PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID
  AND    PCDL2.line_type = 'R'
  AND    ROWNUM = 1
  ) as gl_date, 
  ( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 
  WHERE  PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID
  AND    PCDL2.line_type = 'R'
  AND    ROWNUM = 1
  ) as recvr_gl_date,


  
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.reversed_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.task_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.denom_currency_code,
  (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost)) as denom_raw_cost,
  (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost)) AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_currency_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_exchange_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.work_type_id,
  
  
  jeg_get_gl_period(( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 
  WHERE  PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID
  AND    PCDL2.line_type = 'R'
  AND    ROWNUM = 1
),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) as gl_period_name,

 jeg_get_pa_period(( SELECT GREATEST(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xah, PCDL2.gl_Date) FROM   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all PCDL2 
  WHERE  PCDL2.expenditure_item_id = JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID
  AND    PCDL2.line_type = 'R'
  AND    ROWNUM = 1
  ),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) as pa_period_name,
  
  
  --nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_name, JEG_MV_COST_PA.gl_period_name) as gl_period_name,
  --nvl(JEG_MV_COST_PA.recvr_pa_period_name,JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_currency_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_item_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.job_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  INCURRED_BY_HR_ID as JEG_MV_COST_PA_HR_ID,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.incurred_by_organization_id,
  0 as entered_by,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.vendor_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.period_set_name,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_set_name,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  null resource_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource,
  (CASE
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS' 
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS' 
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND 
    JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE' 
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND 
    JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(null,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG =  'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') =  'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
     ELSE ' '
   END) resource_class,  
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.wip_resource_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_RAW_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.transaction_source,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, 
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,
  0 as denom_raw_cost,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_hold_flag,
  (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost)) AS BURDEN_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_dist_rejection_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_ic_processed_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_billing_title,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute2,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute5,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.JEG_GET_CLASS_FUN,
  JEG_MV_PO.invoice_num,
  JEG_MV_PO.invoice_date,
  JEG_MV_PO.po_num,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource,
   TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3) gl_code_segment3,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_recvr_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute3,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.func_currency_code,
  (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_burdened_cost)) AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount,1)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_raw_cost)) AS FUNC_RAW_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.customer_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num,
  'NON_LABOR_COST' as source_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_header_id
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,null
,CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' 
  OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
  OR UPPER(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE) LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
  OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME
  ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
  ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE
  ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE 
  ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE
FROM 

  JEG_MV_COST_PA1 JEG_MV_COST_PA,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA1 JEG_MV_COST_XLA,
  JEG_MV_PO JEG_MV_PO,
  gl_code_combinations dr_gl_code_combinations
WHERE

  TO_NUMBER(JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_reference2) = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_id
  AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1 = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_distribution_id
  AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.document_distribution_id = JEG_MV_PO.invoice_distribution_id
  
  AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE = 'AP_INV_DIST'
  AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_line_code IN (  'AP_FREIGHT_EXPENSE_CM','AP_FREIGHT_EXPENSE_INV','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_CM','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_DM','AP_ITEM_EXPENSE_INV','AP_MISC_EXPENSE_CM','AP_MISC_EXPENSE_INV','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_CM','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_DM','AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_INV','JEG_US_AP_CM_IC_FRINGE_CR','JEG_US_AP_CM_IC_FRINGE_DR',
'JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_CM_COST_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_CM_REV_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_COST_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INTERCO_REV_ELIM','JEG_US_AP_INV_IC_FRINGE_CR','JEG_US_AP_INV_IC_FRINGE_DR') 

AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id  = 
  nvl(
   -- First try to get the First R Line from PA
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PA_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,      
  -- If R line is not available use the AP line from the Invoice
  nvl(JEG_MV_PO.AP_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
  -- If all else fails to back to CDL
  ,JEG_MV_COST_PA.PCDLA_code_combination_id)
  )
    AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.APPLICATION_ID = 200
